explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.

topPros.title: excellent tuber-category fit
topPros.explanation: Strong vitamin support and gentler carb behaviour make it one of the cleanest tuber-category foods.

topCons.title: naturally sweeter than some tubers
topCons.explanation: Still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category.

topCons.title: healthiness depends on preparation
topCons.explanation: Heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome.

topCons.title: protein contribution is light
topCons.explanation: Like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 51 from a base nutrition score of 51. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: practical staple carb source
topPros.explanation: Tubers are often judged by how usable they are day to day.

topPros.title: whole-food carb package
topPros.explanation: That matters because it is a cleaner baseline than heavily refined carbs.

topPros.title: can be quite filling
topPros.explanation: A useful practical strength when the preparation stays sensible.

topCons.title: still a carb-heavy category
topCons.explanation: That is the core ceiling tubers have to manage.

topCons.title: preparation changes outcomes a lot
topCons.explanation: What you do to a tuber can make or break it.

topCons.title: protein support is weak
topCons.explanation: Tubers still need help from the rest of the meal.

topCons.title: fried format is a major category negative

topCons.explanation: A major practical strike against the food in a carb-behaviour category.

topCons.title: energy density is much harsher than ideal
topCons.explanation: Much easier to overshoot calories than with cleaner tuber forms.
